context: Tests whether the agent correctly applies MERGE mode when adding new DNS records to a domain with existing manually-configured records, avoiding OVERWRITE which would delete production records, and demonstrates knowledge of the Terraform import workflow for bringing existing state under management.

checklist.name: Uses MERGE mode
checklist.description: The namecheap_domain_records resource explicitly sets mode = "MERGE" OR omits the mode argument (which defaults to MERGE)

checklist.name: Does NOT use OVERWRITE
checklist.description: The configuration does NOT set mode = "OVERWRITE" anywhere — using OVERWRITE would delete all existing production records

checklist.name: Only staging records defined
checklist.description: The resource only defines the three new staging records (staging A record, api-staging CNAME, staging TXT), not a broad set of all domain records

checklist.name: Correct import command
checklist.description: The import_commands.sh file contains a terraform import command with the format: terraform import namecheap_domain_records.<name> brighthorizons.agency

checklist.name: Lowercase hostnames
checklist.description: All hostname values in record blocks use only lowercase characters

checklist.name: CNAME trailing dot
checklist.description: The CNAME record address ends with a trailing dot

checklist.name: Provider version constraint
checklist.description: The required_providers block specifies version = ">= 2.0.0" or compatible constraint
